old_str_preview.cmd:
cat > /tmp/wal.go << 'EOF'
package main

import (
	"bufio"
	"encoding/binary"
	"fmt"
	"hash/crc32"
	"io"
	"os"
	"sync"
	"time"
)

// WALEntry is a single key-value record in the WAL.
type WALEntry struct {
	Key, Value string
}

// WAL is a write-ahead log that durably stores key-value pairs.
type WAL struct {
	file           *os.File
	buf            *bufio.Writer
	mu             sync.Mutex
	currentOffset  int64 // bytes written so far
	lastSyncOffset int64 // bytes synced so far
	closeCh

old_str_preview.cmd: cd /workspace && go build -o kvwal ./... && rm -f /tmp/kvwal.wal /tmp/kvwal.wal.sync && ./kvwal serve & SERVER_PID=$! && sleep 0.5 && ACKED=$(./kvwal client write-batch 50) && kill -9 $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null && wait $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true && ./kvwal crash-recover && ./kvwal serve & SERVER_PID=$! && sleep 0.5 && ./kvwal client verify-batch "$ACKED" && kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null && wait $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true
